theme: Light Mode + Dark Mode toggle required

headings.usage: Screen titles, display names, major section headers. Delivers a premium, editorial aesthetic.

body.usage: Chat messages, bios, input fields, labels. Clean, geometric, and highly legible.

spacing_and_layout.global_wrapper: Use responsive design. For web viewing, wrap the app in `w-full md:max-w-md md:mx-auto h-screen overflow-hidden relative shadow-2xl bg-background text-foreground` to simulate a pristine mobile app. Full width on actual mobile devices.
spacing_and_layout.padding: MD3 inspired generous padding. Use `p-4`, `p-6`, or `p-8` for screen containers.
spacing_and_layout.border_radius: MD3 large rounded corners. Use `rounded-3xl` for bottom sheets and major cards, `rounded-full` for avatars and pills.
spacing_and_layout.grid_system: Use flex layouts for chat lists and bento-grids (`grid-cols-2 gap-4`) for user profiles.

navigation_pattern.description: Original UI Component: Reject standard 5-icon bottom tabs. Implement a 'Floating Dynamic Island' at the bottom of the screen.
navigation_pattern.floating_island: A pill-shaped glassmorphic nav bar (`backdrop-blur-2xl bg-background/80 border border-border rounded-full px-6 py-4 mx-4 mb-6 shadow-lg`). Items: Feed, Search, Nexus (Center Action for New Chat/Story), Friends, Profile.
navigation_pattern.header: Minimalist sticky header with MD3 typography. Use `backdrop-blur-xl` and `bg-background/80` for smooth scrolling underneath.

component_strategies.buttons: MD3 Pill Buttons: Primary buttons use `rounded-full bg-primary text-primary-foreground` with a subtle elevation shadow. Hover/Active state adds a darker tonal layer.
component_strategies.inputs: Filled Tonal Inputs (MD3 style): `bg-secondary text-foreground border-none rounded-2xl px-4 py-4 focus-visible:ring-2 focus-visible:ring-primary`.
component_strategies.chat_bubbles: Original: Soft asymmetric bubbles. Sent: `bg-primary text-primary-foreground rounded-3xl rounded-br-sm`. Received: `bg-secondary text-secondary-foreground rounded-3xl rounded-bl-sm`. Padding `px-5 py-3`.
component_strategies.stories_carousel: Editorial Cards: Instead of small circles, use tall vertical cards (`w-28 h-40 rounded-2xl`) with cinematic image overlays (`bg-black/40`). User's story has a primary colored '+' badge.
component_strategies.cards: Elevated Surfaces: `bg-card rounded-3xl border border-border shadow-sm p-4`.

motion_and_interactions.page_transitions: Smooth animations required. Slide up with a slight scale-down of the background page (MD3 shared axis transition).
motion_and_interactions.micro_interactions: Tap states scale down (`active:scale-95`). Use smooth layout transitions for typing indicators and read receipts.
motion_and_interactions.bottom_sheet: MD3 Bottom Sheet architecture for settings, message actions, and story views. Draggable, rounded top corners (`rounded-t-3xl`), dims background to `bg-black/60`.

media_and_assets.icons: lucide-react. Use thin, elegant strokes to contrast with the bold typography.

auth_background.description: Fluid metallic waves, used as a premium background for the login/signup screens.

testing.requirements: All interactive elements MUST include `data-testid` attributes (e.g., `data-testid="login-submit-button"`, `data-testid="chat-send-action"`).

instructions_to_main_agent: Build 'XYTEEE Nexus' as a highly original social chat platform.
Implement a complete Dark and Light mode using the provided CSS variables/colors. Do NOT use default Tailwind blues or grays.
Apply 'Playfair Display' for Headings and 'Outfit' for Body text. Use standard web fonts imports.
Do NOT use standard bottom tabs. Implement the 'Floating Dynamic Island' navigation concept to satisfy the 'original navigation system' requirement.
Incorporate Material Design 3 concepts (large pill shapes, tonal surfaces, high elevation bottom sheets) but styled with the 'Luxury' archetype colors.
Ensure the application structure simulates a mobile app (`max-w-md mx-auto h-screen` wrapper) if running in a browser.
Develop real-time components (chat, typing indicators) with smooth framer-motion animations.
